design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as The Punisher, Marvel's vigilante anti-hero, dispensing violent justice against criminals

world_building_techniques: Marvel IP context (player familiarity with Punisher character)

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Punisher (NES) article
data_quality_notes: T3 tier data: source provides minimal design documentation. Available information limited to: developer credits (Beam Software, programmer Jamie Rivett, graphics by Holger Liebnitz), publication metadata (LJN publisher, January 1991 US release), and Easter egg mechanics. No substantive design philosophy, difficulty mechanics, progression system, or boss design documentation available in source material.
